## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test` pass
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy`, `cargo test` pass (if backend changed)
- [ ] UI text is English only
- [ ] Interactive UI is keyboard-accessible
